_about: Known small-molecule inhibitors per target, each tied to a GROUNDED evidence edge, so the docking/ADMET beat starts from real cited chemistry — not an invented ligand. SMILES carry a PubChem CID for auditability. Tamarind Bio runs the ADMET drug-property prediction and the docking pose into the AlphaFold structure.

A8H40_RS19975.name: CCCP
A8H40_RS19975.note: CCCP collapses the proton-motive force that powers the efflux transporter. The efflux edge 'is_target_of CCCP' is grounded to CARD:ARO:3000074 — so docking CCCP into the AlphaFold efflux structure starts from cited evidence, not a guess.
